creator: mich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Markus, 

First off, this seems to be a fork of the original code from Hendrik Scholz.
The new fork is maintained by Matthias Schmitz.

The only change I can see from his commits is the switch from GNU build system to scons.

There does not seem to be any functional change whatsoever. 

I tried sending a mail to both Hendrik and Matthias for a comment, but I've had no reply.

Please explain why you would like to have this port updated to 0.4.2 ?

Thank you, 

/mich
